evidence.snippet: Building on a powerful intellectual property portfolio, Hemisphere GNSS has become a leader in the high-performance satellite positioning and heading marketplace with a robust technology foundation and a relentless focus on innovation.
Vector™ VS-i8 Inertial Navigation System

items.notes: Core business: GNSS OEM boards, receivers, smart antennas, INS, and GNSS antennas for high-precision positioning and heading. VS-i8 INS explicitly listed for UAV applications.

value.address: 1700 N Desert Drive Ste 101, Tempe, AZ 85288

evidence.snippet:
HEADQUARTERS, U.S. OPERATIONS, & DISTRIBUTION/FULFILLMENT
---------------------------------------------------------
[1700 N Desert Drive Ste 101,](https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZAsUZJSRgZuCytsA7)
[Tempe, AZ 85288 USA](https://www.hemispheregnss.com/contact/_wp_link_placeholder)

Hemisphere is headquartered in Tempe, AZ, USA, delivering its tailored solutions on a global scale with sales in more than 55 countries. Hemisphere also wholly-owns and operates Outback Guidance, based out of Hiawatha, KS, USA, designing, manufacturing, and selling highly-refined precision agriculture steering solutions through a global dealer channel.
The multi-GNSS, multi-frequency HA32 is a high-performance UAV GNSS antenna designed to receive GPS, BeiDou, GLONASS, Galileo, QZSS, SBAS, and Atlas L-band signals.

The Hemisphere VS-i8 is a high accuracy, high precision, Inertial Navigation System (INS) product. Featuring Honeywell® proprietary sensor fusion technology, the VS-i8 leverages a powerful multi-frequency, multi-constellation, RTK-ready navigation and positioning solution for a wide variety of GNSS platforms and applications.

Hemisphere’s innovative GNSS-based solutions are focused on agriculture, construction & mining, marine, and L-band correction service markets, delivered via OEM partners, and under the Hemisphere brand through a global dealer network.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells GNSS OEM boards, antennas, receivers, and INS modules to OEM integrators and end users. Dedicated UAV products include HA32 UAV GNSS Antenna and VS-i8 INS.

fetch_requests.reason: Dedicated UAV GNSS antenna product page would confirm UAV-specific specs and any compliance claims relevant to the drone supply chain profile.

tagline: Manufactures multi-frequency GNSS OEM boards (Phantom, Vega), receivers, antennas, and inertial-navigation systems for UAV and robotics integration, plus the Atlas L-band global correction service. Production-ready across portfolio. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense/allied unmanned-systems adoption is thin.
